generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder measuring hoist swing motion in physical crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed in physical crane system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of hoist swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance SensorReadingsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated time-series data of sensor readings including swing angle and wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance ControlCommandsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of control commands sent to physical crane components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance ValidationMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of validation metrics from continuous validation process"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance TMC4671EvalCartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart stepper motor in physical crane system"
]

instance TMC4671EvalHoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist stepper motor in physical crane system"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling in physical crane system"
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of lab-scale gantry crane inspired by Antwerp harbor cranes"
]

instance ArduinoControlHardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller-based hardware for physical crane control"
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "GitHub repository for digital twin development documentation"
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing sensor readings, control commands, and validation metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time operational data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for communication between physical sensors and digital services"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for controlling physical crane components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance ArduinoIDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Integrated development environment for programming Arduino microcontroller"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemEvolutionMonitoringService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for creating digital twin geometry"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for time-series data storage in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageServiceInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of crane operations via Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating optimal trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating crane movements for trajectory testing"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for comparing real-time measurements with simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlert, FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker service for data transmission between physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides MQTTCommunicationInsight
]

instance SystemEvolutionMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for system evolution monitoring via DarTwin notation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemEvolutionInsight
]

instance ValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated when validation threshold is breached"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory for crane movement generated by trajectory planning service"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data visualization for operational decision support"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection insight from continuous validation results"
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for trajectory testing"
]

instance MQTTCommunicationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "MQTT communication service for data transmission"
]

instance SystemEvolutionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System evolution monitoring insight via DarTwin notation"
]

instance DataStorageServiceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data storage service for time-series database"
]

instance MaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Maintenance action triggered by continuous validation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trajectory adjustment triggered by continuous validation results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DevelopmentEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Development environment for digital twin system"
    base:contains GitHubRepository, SystemEvolutionMonitoringService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are transmitted via the Control Application and Physical Crane Interface to the motors and electromagnet for execution. The Control Application uses the crane interface to issue movement commands based on digital twin computations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data logging and validation; trajectory execution and simulation comparison occur at sub-second intervals. Continuous Validation Service operates in near real-time for immediate fault detection."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Physical crane hardware connected via Arduino to Python-based Control Application, Logging Application, and HMI; digital services (database, dashboard, trajectory generator, simulation, validation) interconnected via MQTT and TimescaleDB, all deployed on a single PC in a centralized architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers as-operated stage for real-time monitoring and control, and as-designed stage through CAD models and kinematic simulations. Used for continuous validation during operational phase and CAD-based design representation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between simulated and measured trajectories; alerts triggered when metrics exceed predefined thresholds. Uses model validation techniques from [5] to ensure simulation fidelity against real-world measurements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; serial/USB for Arduino to PC communication. Data flows between physical sensors and digital services via MQTT broker."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed on a personal computer using Docker containers for database, dashboard, and MQTT broker; gantrylib Python module for other components. All services run on a single host machine with docker compose for orchestration."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Ad-hoc implementation using open-source tools without adherence to specific digital twin standards. No industry standards referenced; relies on general-purpose technologies like MQTT, PostgreSQL, and Docker."
]
